# FFCapabilitiesEffectType | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ Force Feedback ](/documentation/forcefeedback)

- [ FFCapabilitiesEffectType ](/documentation/forcefeedback/ffcapabilitieseffecttype)

-  FFCapabilitiesEffectType 

Type Alias# FFCapabilitiesEffectType

Mac Catalyst 13.0+macOS 10.2+

```
typealias FFCapabilitiesEffectType = UInt32
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/forcefeedback/ffcapabilitieseffecttype#Discussion)

Types used in the emulatedEffects or supportedEffects members of the FFCAPABILITIES structure. Used to describe whether the particular effect type is supported or emulated by the device.
